tools.name: helix_work_item
tools.title: Helix Work Item Details
tools.description: Get detailed Helix work item info including exit code, state, machine, duration, uploaded files, and console log URL.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

workItem.description: Helix work item name; optional only when jobId is a full Helix work item URL

tools.name: helix_download
tools.title: Download Helix Files or URL
tools.description: Download Helix work-item files by file glob or download a direct Helix file URL. Returns local file paths.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

workItem.description: Helix work item name; optional only when jobId is a full Helix work item URL

pattern.description: File name or glob pattern (e.g., *.binlog). Default: all files

url.description: Direct file URL to download (bypasses jobId/workItem)

tools.name: azdo_test_results
tools.title: AzDO Test Results
tools.description: Get Azure DevOps (AzDO) test results for a specific test run. Defaults to failed tests only.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

runId.description: Azure DevOps test run ID from azdo_test_runs

tools.name: helix_search
tools.title: Search Helix Work Item Content
tools.description: Search a Helix work item console log or uploaded file for case-insensitive text matches with context. Requires Helix job/work-item identifiers, not AzDO build IDs.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

workItem.description: Helix work item name; optional only when jobId is a full Helix work item URL

fileName.description: Uploaded Helix file name to search, from helix_files. Omit to search the console log.

pattern.description: Case-insensitive text substring to search for; not a regex

contextLines.description: Lines of context around each match

tools.name: helix_ci_guide
tools.title: CI Investigation Guide
tools.description: Repo-specific CI guidance for choosing Azure DevOps (AzDO) vs Helix tools, failure patterns, and exit codes.

repo.description: Repository short name (for example, runtime or sdk); omit for overview

tools.name: azdo_build_analysis
tools.title: Build Analysis Known Issues
tools.description: Extract Build Analysis known issue matches from an Azure DevOps (AzDO) build ID or URL.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: helix_logs
tools.title: Helix Work Item Logs
tools.description: Get console log content for a Helix work item. Requires a Helix job GUID/URL plus work item name (or full Helix work item URL).

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

workItem.description: Helix work item name; optional only when jobId is a full Helix work item URL

tail.description: Lines from end to return (default: 500 most recent lines)

tools.name: azdo_search_timeline
tools.title: AzDO Search Timeline
tools.description: Search Azure DevOps (AzDO) build timeline record names and issue messages for a case-insensitive substring. Returns matching records with AzDO log IDs for azdo_log or azdo_search_log.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

pattern.description: Case-insensitive text substring to search for; not a regex

recordType.description: Optional Azure DevOps timeline record type filter: 'Stage', 'Job', or 'Task'

resultFilter.description: Filter: 'failed' (default), 'all', 'running' (in-progress records), 'pending' (not started), 'incomplete' (not completed), or 'issues' (errors/warnings only).

tools.name: helix_auth_status
tools.title: Helix Auth Status
tools.description: Current Helix auth status: authenticated or anonymous, and token source (env var, stored credential).

tools.name: helix_parse_uploaded_trx
tools.title: Parse Uploaded TRX from Helix
tools.description: Parse TRX/xUnit XML files uploaded to Helix blob storage for one Helix work item. Niche — most repos use azdo_test_results instead.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

workItem.description: Helix work item name; optional only when jobId is a full Helix work item URL

tools.name: azdo_artifacts
tools.title: AzDO Build Artifacts
tools.description: List Azure DevOps (AzDO) build artifacts such as logs, test results, and binlogs. Supports glob-style artifact-name filtering.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: azdo_helix_jobs
tools.title: Helix Jobs from Build
tools.description: Extract Helix job IDs from an Azure DevOps (AzDO) build. Start with an AzDO build ID/URL, then pass returned Helix job GUIDs to helix_* tools.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: azdo_builds
tools.title: AzDO Build List
tools.description: List recent Azure DevOps (AzDO) builds for a project. Filter by PR, branch, definition, or status.

tools.name: azdo_test_attachments
tools.title: AzDO Test Attachments
tools.description: List Azure DevOps (AzDO) attachments for a test result, such as screenshots, logs, and dumps. Requires run ID and result ID from azdo_test_results.

runId.description: Azure DevOps test run ID from azdo_test_runs

resultId.description: Azure DevOps test result ID from azdo_test_results

tools.name: azdo_test_runs
tools.title: AzDO Test Runs
tools.description: Get Azure DevOps (AzDO) test run summaries for a build with total/passed/failed counts. ⚠️ Run-level failedTests can be inaccurate — always drill into azdo_test_results to verify.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: azdo_search_log
tools.title: Search AzDO Build Logs
tools.description: Search Azure DevOps (AzDO) build step logs for a case-insensitive text pattern. Provide logId for one step, or omit it to search all ranked steps.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

pattern.description: Case-insensitive text substring to search for; not a regex

contextLines.description: Lines of context around each match

maxLogsToSearch.description: Maximum log steps to search. Default: 50

minLogLines.description: Minimum lines per log to search

tools.name: helix_status
tools.title: Helix Job Status
tools.description: Get pass/fail summary for a Helix job. Requires a Helix job GUID/URL, not an Azure DevOps build ID.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

tools.name: helix_batch_status
tools.title: Batch Helix Job Status
tools.description: Get status for multiple Helix jobs at once. Accepts Helix job GUIDs/URLs only, not AzDO build IDs. Maximum 50 jobs per request.

jobIds.description: Array of Helix job IDs as JSON strings (GUIDs) or Helix job URLs; not AzDO build IDs

tools.name: helix_find_files
tools.title: Find Files in Helix Job
tools.description: Search work items in a Helix job for uploaded files matching a glob pattern. Requires a Helix job GUID/URL, not an AzDO build ID.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

pattern.description: File name or glob pattern (e.g., *.binlog). Default: all files

maxItems.description: Maximum work items to scan. Default: 50

tools.name: helix_files
tools.title: Helix Work Item Files
tools.description: List uploaded files for a Helix work item, grouped by type. Requires Helix job/work-item identifiers, not AzDO build IDs.

jobId.description: Helix job ID as a JSON string (GUID), Helix job URL, or full Helix work item URL; not an AzDO build ID

workItem.description: Helix work item name; optional only when jobId is a full Helix work item URL

tools.name: azdo_timeline
tools.title: AzDO Build Timeline
tools.description: Get the Azure DevOps (AzDO) build timeline with stages, jobs, and tasks. Find failed steps and AzDO log IDs for azdo_log. Consider azdo_search_timeline for large builds.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: azdo_auth_status
tools.title: AzDO Auth Status
tools.description: Current AzDO auth method (anonymous, PAT, Entra, az CLI), expiry, and warnings. No API call made.

tools.name: azdo_build
tools.title: AzDO Build Details
tools.description: Get details of an Azure DevOps (AzDO) build: status, result, definition, source branch, timing, and web URL. Use AzDO build IDs/URLs, not Helix job IDs.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: azdo_changes
tools.title: AzDO Build Changes
tools.description: Get commits/changes for an Azure DevOps (AzDO) build. Returns commit IDs, messages, authors, and timestamps.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID

tools.name: azdo_log
tools.title: AzDO Build Log
tools.description: Get Azure DevOps (AzDO) log content for a build step. Use the AzDO log ID from azdo_timeline. Returns last N lines by default.

buildIdOrUrl.description: AzDO build ID as a JSON string (for example, '1438863') or full Azure DevOps build URL; not a Helix job ID
